challenge.title: Vežba 37
challenge.description: Ovo je pregled svih razgovora koje ste upravo pročitali.
challenge.instructions:
Napišite sledeće reči ili rečenice na pravo mesto:

confirm, I do, help, Can I, describe, na I'll try.

fillInTheBlank.sentence:
Delivery Man: Hi there, I have a package for Tom. Do you know him?

Sophie: Yes, BLANK. He's part of the design team. But he's not at his desk right now. BLANK help you with something?

Delivery Man: That's alright. I need to BLANK it's him before I leave this package. Can you BLANK him for me?

Sophie: Sure, Tom is a tall guy with a friendly smile. He's got long, dark hair and does not wear glasses. You can't miss his goatee. He also likes wearing a scarf or something. Does that BLANK?

Delivery Man: Absolutely, thanks for the description. BLANK to find him around here.

blanks.feedback: Ovo znači „da“ ili da pristajete, ili da imate te informacije.
Uvažan način pružanja pomoći ili traženja dozvole. Prvi slovo je veliko.
Ovo znači proveriti da li je nešto tačno ili istinito.
Ovo znači objasniti ili napisati kako nešto izgleda ili kako radi/funkcioniše.
Ovo znači da ćeš se potruditi da nešto uradiš, čak i ako nije lako.
